reasoning: According to multiple authoritative box office sources retrieved from late 2025 and early 2026, 'A Minecraft Movie' grossed approximately $157M-$163M (officially $162.7M according to the Boxoffice Pro 2025 in Review) during its 3-day domestic opening weekend. This was the largest 3-day opening of the year. The closest competitors were 'Wicked: For Good' (~$151M), 'Lilo & Stitch' ($146M), and 'Superman' ($122M-$125M). 'Jurassic World Rebirth' took in $147M over a 5-day holiday frame but only $91.5M in the 3-day weekend. Since 2025 is fully concluded and 'A Minecraft Movie' is universally cited as having the highest standard 3-day domestic opening weekend, the market criteria are met. I'm providing the maximum allowed confidence of 0.95 based on retrospective facts.
